opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Drain Pro has no booking button, no contact form, and is phone-only contact.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing emergencies in Boise go to competitors with online booking.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI scheduling widget to capture emergency drain calls 24/7 without phone staff.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and zero digital intake beyond a phone number.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call from Boise customers is lost with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture and CRM logging to record, transcribe, and tag every inbound call.

opportunities.label: Post-Job Follow Up
opportunities.signal: 234 reviews at 4.8 stars but no review-request patterns or loyalty signals detected.
opportunities.observation: Drain Pro earns strong satisfaction but leaves repeat business and referrals on the table.
opportunities.fix: Automate post-job SMS sequences to request reviews and offer seasonal drain maintenance bookings.
